# Template: DESCRIPTION

```text
Package: cityOpenData
Type: Package
Title: A Lightweight Interface to CITY_NAME Open Data APIs
Version: 0.1.0
Authors@R:
    person(
      "FIRST_NAME", "LAST_NAME",
      email = "your.email@example.com",
      role = c("aut", "cre"),
      comment = c(
        GitHub = "YOUR_GITHUB_USERNAME",
        ORCID = "YOUR_ORCID"
      )
    )
Description: Provides a unified set of helper functions to access datasets
    from the CITY_NAME Open Data platform <https://SOCRATA_DOMAIN/>.
    Functions return results as tidy tibbles and support optional filtering,
    sorting, and row limits via the Socrata API. The package provides a
    consistent interface for discovering and downloading datasets from the
    CITY_NAME Open Data Portal using human-readable dataset keys or official
    Socrata dataset identifiers.
License: MIT + file LICENSE
Encoding: UTF-8
RoxygenNote: 7.3.3
Imports:
    curl,
    dplyr,
    httr,
    janitor,
    jsonlite,
    rlang,
    tibble
Suggests:
    ggplot2,
    knitr,
    rmarkdown,
    scales,
    testthat (>= 3.0.0),
    tidyr,
    vcr (>= 0.6.0),
    webmockr
URL: https://YOUR_WEBSITE, https://github.com/YOUR_GITHUB_USERNAME/cityOpenData
BugReports: https://github.com/YOUR_GITHUB_USERNAME/cityOpenData/issues
VignetteBuilder: knitr
Config/testthat/edition: 3
Depends:
    R (>= 3.5)
```

## Checklist

| Template value           | Replace with                            |
|--------------------------|-----------------------------------------|
| `cityOpenData`           | Your package name (e.g., `chiOpenData`) |
| `CITY_NAME`              | Full city name                          |
| `SOCRATA_DOMAIN`         | The city's Open Data portal domain      |
| `FIRST_NAME`             | Your first name                         |
| `LAST_NAME`              | Your last name                          |
| `your.email@example.com` | Your email address                      |
| `YOUR_GITHUB_USERNAME`   | Your GitHub username                    |
| `YOUR_ORCID`             | Your ORCID identifier (optional)        |
| `https://YOUR_WEBSITE`   | Package website (pkgdown or other)      |
